residual_limits: No real learner data before EFVP and legal validation.
The 1x, 10x and 100x result is a deterministic contract-model load test, not a distributed production soak test.
Six development-only dependency advisories remain: one low and five moderate; production dependencies have zero audit findings.
Twenty inherited lint warnings remain, primarily image optimization warnings; there are zero lint errors.
Datadog runtime connection remains action 158; G13 validates its no-learner-content contract only.
No production, legal, clinical, disciplinary, enforcement or autonomous authority readiness is claimed.
